Luke Skywalker.fun_fact: Bullseyed womp rats in his T-16.

Leia Organa (Princess Leia).fun_fact: The youngest senator in the senate at just 18 years old.

Boba Fett.fun_fact: At 13 years old he was behind the attempted assassination of Mace Windu.

Obi-Wan Kenobi.fun_fact: Was in love with Duchess Satine of Mandalore.

Padme Amidala.fun_fact: (Quote) 'So this is how liberty dies. With thunderous applause.'

Emperor Palpatine (Darth Sidious).fun_fact: Manipulated both sides of the Clone Wars.

Han Solo.fun_fact: Made the Kessel Run in less than twelve parsecs.

Darth Maul.fun_fact: Was stolen from his home as a baby by Palpatine and forced into a life of evil.
